title: nie-tui AppState struct and domain types
description:
**What:** Define the AppState struct in tui/src/app.rs — all mutable runtime state for the TUI.

**Algorithm:**
1. Create tui/src/app.rs.
2. Define AppState with fields:
   - my_pub_id: String — own pub_id (set at startup, immutable after)
   - online: Vec<UserInfo> — sorted ascending by sequence (online[0] = MLS admin)
   - online_seq: HashMap<String, u64> — pub_id → connection sequence
   - nicknames: HashMap<String, String> — server nicknames cache
   - local_names: HashMap<String, String> — local contact aliases (from contacts.json)
   - messages: VecDeque<ChatLine> — bounded ring buffer (last 5000 lines max)
   - scroll_offset: usize — lines from bottom (0 = show latest)
   - input: String — current input buffer
   - input_cursor: usize — byte offset in input
   - focus: Focus — enum { Input, UserList }
   - connection: ConnectionState — enum { Connecting, Connected, Reconnecting { delay_secs }, Offline }
   - mls_active: bool
   - mls_client: MlsClient — ephemeral, reset on reconnect
   - hpke_identity_secret: [u8; 32] — own X25519 secret (for sealed messages when MLS inactive)
   - room_hpke_secret: Option<[u8; 32]> — MLS-derived room secret (when MLS active)
   - payment_overlays: VecDeque<PaymentOverlay> — timed overlay notifications
   - subscriptions: HashMap<Uuid, PaymentSession> — in-flight payment sessions
   - own_profile: HashMap<String, String> — own profile fields
   - ever_connected: bool — true after first DirectoryList received
3. Define ChatLine: enum { Chat { from: String, text: String, ts: DateTime<Utc> }, System(String) }
4. Define Focus: enum { Input, UserList }
5. Define ConnectionState: enum { Connecting, Connected, Reconnecting { delay_secs: u64 }, Offline }
6. Define PaymentOverlay: struct { text: String, created_at: Instant, dismiss_after: Duration }
7. Implement AppState::new(my_pub_id, hpke_identity_secret, mls_client) constructor.
8. Implement AppState::push_message(&mut self, line: ChatLine) — maintains 5000-line cap.
9. Implement AppState::display_name(&self, pub_id: &str) -> String — precedence: server nickname > local alias > pub_id.short().
10. Implement PaymentOverlay::is_expired(&self) -> bool.

**Defensive programming rules:**
- VecDeque cap: if messages.len() >= 5000, pop_front before push_back.
- Never derive Debug on MlsClient (check nie-core/src/mls.rs — if MlsClient derives Debug, create a wrapper).
- hpke_identity_secret is key material: never log it. AppState must NOT derive Debug (would expose key material).
- online[0] invariant: never sort the online Vec in place — document this in a comment.
- input_cursor must be a valid UTF-8 byte boundary — validate in all mutation methods.

**Agent team:** Standard (R+I+V). R reads core/src/mls.rs, core/src/messages.rs, cli/src/commands.rs for existing state patterns. I implements app.rs. V runs cargo check -p nie-tui.

**Tests:** Unit tests for push_message cap (push 5001, verify len==5000), display_name precedence, PaymentOverlay::is_expired.
acceptance_criteria: cargo check -p nie-tui exits 0; unit tests pass for AppState::push_message cap and display_name precedence
